parameters: There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
Please, don't tell anyone where I'm hiding! There's no knowing
what Shingana will do to me! *Tremble* *Tremble*...
...Huh!? You're going to fight the King of Shingana? Impossible!
Y-You're serious... You should take this, then. It's my trump card.
I got it before my will to fight was broken.
Seeing how many slaves were tortured here... It broke my heart.
The screams... The blood... Every time I remember it,
Please! Please lea-! ...Huh? You defeated the King of Shingana?
I thought the fortress seemed a little busy... Eh? You mean it?
